queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of how the absence of a checking account influences credit risk drivers and reduces default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Determinants of default: Investigating the risk-mitigating effects of critical or alternative existing credit histories on borrower solvency.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: no known savings account.
queries.question: Credit risk drivers: Evaluating the correlation between the lack of a documented savings account and lower default likelihood in consumer lending.
